title: Table showing only next 2 weeks for non completed activities
excerpt: Hi all, I want to create a table with a filter on the timeline & sub timeline so that only dates in the next two weeks show, for items that are not done. Please can someone show me how to do this.

posts.author: Duvallca (Catherine Duvall)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi all, I want to create a table with a filter on the timeline & sub timeline so that only dates in the next two weeks show, for items that are not done. Please can someone show me how to do this.
